cards.question: Что такое SAFe?
cards.reference: Scaled Agile Framework — набор организационных и workflow patterns для Agile at enterprise scale.

cards.question: SAFe Big Picture — уровни?
cards.reference: Team, Program (ART), Large Solution (optional), Portfolio, Full — в зависимости от конфигурации.

cards.question: Что такое ART?
cards.reference: Agile Release Train — long-lived team of Agile teams (5–12), синхронизированная поставка value stream.

cards.question: RTE — роль?
cards.reference: Release Train Engineer — «chief Scrum Master» train: PI planning facilitation, impediments, flow.

cards.question: System Architect/Engineer?
cards.reference: Техническое направление, enablers, NFRs, архитектурный runway на ART.

cards.question: Product Management в SAFe?
cards.reference: Content authority на Program level: Features, WSJF, roadmap на PI.

cards.question: Business Owners?
cards.reference: Ключевые stakeholders train; assign value на PI objectives; go/no-go на ROI.

cards.question: Что такое PI (Program Increment)?
cards.reference: Timebox 8–12 weeks (default 10) + Innovation & Planning (IP) iteration.

cards.question: PI Planning — суть?
cards.reference: 2-day event: vision, team breakouts, draft plans, dependencies, PI Objectives, confidence vote.

cards.question: PI Objectives?
cards.reference: Business + team objectives на PI; SMART, measurable; used in Inspect & Adapt.

cards.question: Stretch objectives?
cards.reference: Дополнительные цели при избытке capacity — явно optional.

cards.question: Team PI Objectives vs Program?
cards.reference: Teams commit свои; aggregated на train level с Business Owners.

cards.question: Innovation & Planning iteration?
cards.reference: Buffer для learning, hackathon, tech debt, planning next PI — no feature pressure.

cards.question: Inspect & Adapt (I&A)?
cards.reference: End of PI: PI system demo, quantitative review, problem-solving workshop.

cards.question: WSJF?
cards.reference: Weighted Shortest Job First: Cost of Delay / Job Size — prioritization на program/portfolio.

cards.question: Cost of Delay?
cards.reference: Экономическая цена задержки: value, time criticality, risk reduction/opportunity enablement.

cards.question: Feature в SAFe?
cards.reference: Program-level backlog item, декомposируется в stories на teams.

cards.question: Enabler features?
cards.reference: Infrastructure, architecture, exploration — поддерживают future features.

cards.question: Architectural runway?
cards.reference: Техническая подготовка на 2–3 PI вперёд для upcoming features.

cards.question: NFRs (Nonfunctional Requirements)?
cards.reference: Performance, security, compliance — as backlog constraints и enablers.

cards.question: Solution Train?
cards.reference: Для large solutions: несколько ARTs + suppliers, synchronized PI.

cards.question: Portfolio SAFe?
cards.reference: Strategy & investment funding, lean portfolio management, value streams.

cards.question: Value stream identification?
cards.reference: Operational или development value streams — кто поставляет ценность end-to-end.

cards.question: Lean Portfolio Management?
cards.reference: Funding value streams, not projects; guardrails; portfolio kanban.

cards.question: Epic в SAFe?
cards.reference: Large initiative; проходит portfolio kanban: funnel → review → analysis → backlog → implementing.

cards.question: Lean business case для epic?
cards.reference: Оценка WSJF, cost, MVP, go/pivot/stop перед major funding.

cards.question: Guardrails?
cards.reference: Budget, WIP limits, DoD на portfolio — decentralize decisions within boundaries.

cards.question: Continuous Learning Culture?
cards.reference: One of SAFe core competencies — learning organization.

cards.question: Lean-Agile Leadership?
cards.reference: Leaders model behaviors, empower teams, drive change.

cards.question: Team and Technical Agility?
cards.reference: Scrum/Kanban, XP practices, built-in quality на team level.

cards.question: Agile Product Delivery?
cards.reference: Customer centricity, design thinking, continuous delivery on ART.

cards.question: Enterprise Solution Delivery?
cards.reference: Large solution coordination, suppliers, compliance.

cards.question: Lean Portfolio Management competency?
cards.reference: Strategy, funding, governance aligned to flow of value.

cards.question: Organizational Agility?
cards.reference: Flexible org design, lean thinking across business.

cards.question: Continuous Learning Culture competency?
cards.reference: Invest in people, communities of practice, innovation.

cards.question: Built-in Quality?
cards.reference: TDD, CI, pair work, architecture as code — quality не «phase at end».

cards.question: Program backlog?
cards.reference: Prioritized features/enablers для ART; owned by Product Management.

cards.question: Team backlog?
cards.reference: Stories для одной Agile team в текущем PI.

cards.question: Iteration (Sprint) в SAFe?
cards.reference: Default 2 weeks внутри PI; same as Scrum at team level.

cards.question: System Demo?
cards.reference: End-of-iteration integrated demo across ART — real system, not team silos.

cards.question: PO Sync?
cards.reference: Regular PO/PM sync dependencies и priorities across teams.

cards.question: Scrum of Scrums в SAFe?
cards.reference: Coach sync / ART sync для cross-team coordination.

cards.question: ART sync?
cards.reference: Weekly RTE-led: progress, risks, dependencies на train.

cards.question: Чем PI Planning отличается от big upfront planning?
cards.reference: PI Planning — 8–12 week horizon with inspect & adapt each PI, not multi-year fixed plan.

cards.question: Чем Feature отличается от Epic?
cards.reference: Feature — program backlog (weeks). Epic — portfolio initiative (months/quarters).

cards.question: Чем RTE отличается от Scrum Master?
cards.reference: RTE координирует train и PI events; SM — одну команду.

cards.question: Чем SAFe отличается от LeSS?
cards.reference: SAFe — prescriptive framework with roles/events at scale. LeSS — minimal scaling Scrum with one backlog.

cards.question: PI Planning: confidence vote 40%. Что делать?
cards.reference: Re-plan breakouts: resolve dependencies, scope adjustment, enablers, risks — до acceptable confidence или explicit trade-offs.

cards.question: Team завершила все stories, но System Demo broken. Проблема?
cards.reference: Integration neglected — need CI, system team, Definition of Done на ART level, regular system demos each iteration.

cards.question: 100 features in PI, teams overloaded. Root cause?
cards.reference: WIP overload at program level; apply WSJF, reduce WIP, realistic capacity based on velocity history.

cards.question: Конфигурация Essential SAFe?
cards.reference: Team + ART — минимальная конфигурация

cards.question: Конфигурация Large Solution SAFe?
cards.reference: + Solution Train для complex products

cards.question: Конфигурация Portfolio SAFe?
cards.reference: + LPM для strategy and funding

cards.question: Конфигурация Full SAFe?
cards.reference: All levels — enterprise-wide

cards.question: WSJF: User/business value?
cards.reference: WSJF numerator component

cards.question: WSJF: Time criticality?
cards.reference: deadline/market window

cards.question: WSJF: RR/OE?
cards.reference: Risk Reduction / Opportunity Enablement

cards.question: WSJF: Job size?
cards.reference: WSJF denominator — estimate effort

cards.question: Когда проводится PI Planning?
cards.reference: Cadence event на program/large solution level — см. SAFe Big Picture для частоты.

cards.question: Когда проводится System Demo?
cards.reference: Cadence event на program/large solution level — см. SAFe Big Picture для частоты.

cards.question: Когда проводится Inspect & Adapt?
cards.reference: Cadence event на program/large solution level — см. SAFe Big Picture для частоты.

cards.question: Когда проводится PO Sync?
cards.reference: Cadence event на program/large solution level — см. SAFe Big Picture для частоты.

cards.question: Когда проводится ART Sync?
cards.reference: Cadence event на program/large solution level — см. SAFe Big Picture для частоты.

cards.question: Когда проводится Solution Demo?
cards.reference: Cadence event на program/large solution level — см. SAFe Big Picture для частоты.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Agile Team?
cards.reference: 5–11 members, Scrum Master, PO, devs — builds increment each iteration.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Team Backlog?
cards.reference: Stories для team в текущем PI.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Iteration Goals?
cards.reference: Team objectives aligned to PI — short term focus.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Iteration Planning?
cards.reference: Team plans stories for iteration like Sprint Planning.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Iteration Review?
cards.reference: Team demo like Sprint Review.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Iteration Retrospective?
cards.reference: Team improvement like Sprint Retro.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Program Increment?
cards.reference: 8–12 week timebox для ART synchronized delivery.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое PI Planning day 1?
cards.reference: Business context, vision, architecture, team breakouts draft.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое PI Planning day 2?
cards.reference: Plan review, ROAM risks, confidence vote, final objectives.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое ROAM?
cards.reference: Resolved, Owned, Accepted, Mitigated — risk categorization на PI planning.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Management review?
cards.reference: Part of PI planning — scope/capacity alignment.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Draft plan review?
cards.reference: Teams present plans, identify dependencies.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Final plan review?
cards.reference: Business Owners accept plan and objectives.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Program Board?
cards.reference: Visual PI plan: features, dependencies, milestones.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Feature timeline?
cards.reference: When feature expected complete across iterations.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Milestone?
cards.reference: Key date on program board — fixed date coordination.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Dependency?
cards.reference: Team A needs Team B — red string on program board.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Capacity?
cards.reference: Team velocity × iterations minus IP sprint.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Load vs capacity?
cards.reference: Compare committed features to team capacity in PI planning.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое ART backlog?
cards.reference: Same as Program backlog — prioritized features/enablers.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Capability?
cards.reference: Long-lived solution area — multiple ARTs possible.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Value stream coordinator?
cards.reference: Coordinates multiple ARTs in value stream.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Solution Intent?
cards.reference: Living repository requirements, design, specs — fixed/flexible.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Fixed content?
cards.reference: Non-negotiable requirements in solution intent.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Variable content?
cards.reference: Evolving specs as learning occurs.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Model-Based Systems Engineering?
cards.reference: MBSE in SAFe for complex systems.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Compliance?
cards.reference: Regulatory needs as NFRs and enablers in backlog.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Lean UX?
cards.reference: SAFe UX loop: hypothesis, MVP, research, ARCHITECT collaboration.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Customer Centricity?
cards.reference: Design thinking, Gemba, continuous exploration.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Continuous Exploration?
cards.reference: Discover needs, ideate MVPs, create roadmap.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Continuous Integration?
cards.reference: Team/ART level frequent integration.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Continuous Deployment?
cards.reference: Automated release pipeline.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Continuous Release?
cards.reference: Release on demand to production.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое DevOps?
cards.reference: CALMR culture in SAFe — break silos dev/ops.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое System Team?
cards.reference: Integrates, runs system CI, supports demos across ART.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Shared Services?
cards.reference: Specialists supporting multiple ARTs.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Community of Practice?
cards.reference: Cross-ART skill sharing (architecture, testing).

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Center of Excellence?
cards.reference: LACE guides transformation.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Implementation roadmap?
cards.reference: Train execs, launch ART, expand, sustain.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Value stream KPI?
cards.reference: Flow, quality, satisfaction, outcomes per value stream.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Lean budget?
cards.reference: Fund value streams not projects — guardrails.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Epic Owner?
cards.reference: Guides epic through portfolio kanban.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Enterprise Architect?
cards.reference: Portfolio tech strategy, enabler epics.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Strategic themes?
cards.reference: Portfolio investment categories linked to strategy.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Portfolio vision?
cards.reference: Long-term direction for solutions.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Portfolio backlog?
cards.reference: Epics prioritized by WSJF.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Portfolio kanban?
cards.reference: Funnel → Reviewing → Analyzing → Backlog → Implementing.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Participatory budgeting?
cards.reference: Collaborative allocation across value streams.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Lean governance?
cards.reference: Lightweight decision rights within guardrails.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Metric: flow velocity?
cards.reference: Features completed per PI on ART.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Metric: flow time?
cards.reference: Time feature in program kanban.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Metric: flow load?
cards.reference: WIP features in progress on ART.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Metric: flow efficiency?
cards.reference: Active vs wait time on program.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Agile contracting?
cards.reference: SAFe guidance on outcome-based vendor contracts.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Supplier?
cards.reference: External team on Solution Train with same PI cadence.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Pre-PI planning?
cards.reference: Prep before main event — backlog readiness.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Post-PI planning?
cards.reference: Follow-up actions after event.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое ART launch?
cards.reference: First PI planning kicks off new train.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Value stream launch?
cards.reference: Multiple ARTs aligned to stream.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое SAFe Summit?
cards.reference: Community conference for practitioners.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое SAFe practice exam?
cards.reference: Assessment for certification prep.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое RTE sync?
cards.reference: Release Train Engineer coordinates SM community.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое PO sync meeting?
cards.reference: Product owners align on priorities weekly.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Architect sync?
cards.reference: System architects coordinate enablers/NFRs.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Coach sync?
cards.reference: Scrum Masters and coaches share impediments.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Business Agility?
cards.reference: SAFe goal — respond rapidly to market change.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Principle: Take economic view?
cards.reference: Understand economic impact of decisions.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Principle: Apply systems thinking?
cards.reference: Optimize whole, not local.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Principle: Assume variability?
cards.reference: Preserve options, empirical decisions.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Principle: Build incrementally?
cards.reference: Fast integrated learning cycles.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Principle: Base milestones on objective evaluation?
cards.reference: Working systems, not documents.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Principle: Visualize WIP?
cards.reference: Limit batch sizes, manage queue lengths.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Principle: Apply cadence?
cards.reference: Synchronize cross-domain planning.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Principle: Decentralize decision-making?
cards.reference: Push authority to teams where possible.

cards.question: SAFe: что такое Principle: Organize around value?
cards.reference: Value streams not functional silos.

cards.question: SAFe: SAFe principles count?
cards.reference: 10 Lean-Agile principles (e.g. take economic view, apply systems thinking, decentralize decisions).

cards.question: SAFe: CALMR approach DevOps?
cards.reference: Culture, Automation, Lean, Measure, Recover — SAFe DevOps competency.

cards.question: SAFe implementation roadmap?
cards.reference: Train leaders → launch ART → expand — incremental not big bang.

cards.question: SPC?
cards.reference: SAFe Program Consultant — certified change agent for SAFe adoption.

cards.question: LACE?
cards.reference: Lean Agile Center of Excellence — coaching and tooling support.

cards.question: Value stream mapping in SAFe?
cards.reference: Identify steps, wait times, automate handoffs on ART.

cards.question: Capacity allocation PI?
cards.reference: Percent capacity for features, enablers, maintenance, innovation.

cards.question: Program KPI?
cards.reference: Predictability measure, PI objectives achievement, flow metrics.

cards.question: Predictability Measure?
cards.reference: Actual business value delivered vs planned PI objectives.

cards.question: Compliance in SAFe?
cards.reference: Built-in quality, documented workflows, approval enablers in backlog.

cards.question: Supplier integration?
cards.reference: Solution train coordinates external vendors on same PI cadence.

cards.question: SAFe vs Spotify model?
cards.reference: SAFe prescriptive; Spotify squads/tribes/chapters — organizational pattern, not full framework.
